## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type
<!-- Tick one. -->
- [ ] fix — bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] feat — new feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no user-visible effect
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — build, CI, or tooling
- [ ] breaking — API changed in an incompatible way

## Changes
<!-- Bulleted list of what actually changed. Reference files where helpful. -->

## Test plan
<!-- How did you verify this works? Reproduction steps, manual checks, screenshots. -->
-
-

## Checklist
- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .` is clean.
- [ ] `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` is clean.
- [ ] `flutter test` passes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-visible.
- [ ] Public API additions / changes are documented with dartdoc.
- [ ] Visuals changed? Updated `doc/CAPTURE.md` or screenshots.
